name: Mountain shrine
description:
A small shrine lies in one corner of this small clearing. This place 
looks deserted and very forgotten. To your west, a huge stone boulder is
set into the mountain. South leads you back to the mountain path.

exits.description: A huge stone set into the mountain.

extra_descriptions.description:
Written on it :
To attain enlightenment, you first need to fight your own inner demon.
